MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-06-2016 IN 206, DEFENDANT YOUNG NA'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND RELATED DATES. IDIN KASHEFIPOUR APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. KURT BRIDGMAN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT YOUNG NA. STACEY CHAU APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT THE ESTATE OF ROBERT KELLY. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT YOUNG NA'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/9/17 IS CONTINUED TO 3/20/17 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES TO INCLUDE IN THE PROPOSED ORDER A STATEMENT REGARDING THE SCOPE OF DISCOVERY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; COURT REPORTER: SHEILA PHAM, CSR#13293 (415)274-9977. (206)
